name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter at medium speed on electric blender.
2. Gradually add sugars, blending well.
3. Add egg and vanilla; mix well.
4. Combine flour with baking soda, salt, and 1/8 teaspoon of sugar. Mix until well combined.
5. Gradually add the dry mixture to the butter mixture, mixing well.
6. Stir in raisins.
7. Drop dough by 2 teaspoonfuls onto a cooking sheet coated with cooking spray.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10 - 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks.
